name: agent-loops
description: Playbook for the 5 categories of agent loop design patterns (Quality, Memory, Planning, Exploration, System Optimization) — when to use each, its minimal shape, and the exact loop-ledger brake to wire (exit_mode/target_value/direction/max_iterations or dry_rounds). Includes a loop-selector router skill. Skills-only; pairs with the loop-ledger plugin for enforcement.
